TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Jinfeng, title = Jinfeng, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jinfeng} }

S.FORM: Jinfeng Itini i Taitung ko Jinfeng Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 387.53 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 271.51 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 87.22 km²), 5,168 ko tamdaw i Jinfeng Siyang, 1,617 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 5,002 a tamdaw, pakaala to 97%(Paiwan, Rukai) no polong no tamdaw. o Paiwan , Rukai ko sa'alomanay i Taitung. O kasaniyarona 5 ko cun, 27 ko niyaro' i Jinfeng. Vukide , Tjaviljaul , Sapuljuv , Gadu , Pudun , Tjudjaas , Kinilukuljan , Djelunavunavuk , Djumulj , Tjukuvulj , Tjukuvulj-viri , Tudrivuan , Laliavan , Mananigay , Tjulitjulik , Paumeli , Viljauljaul , Kalatadrang , Kaaluan , Maljivel , Valjulu , Madaljalu , Tjuletevetevek , Maledep , Tjuluuai , Ngudra-drekai(新富社區Rukai部落), Rulakes .
S.PHON: *infəŋ itini i taito~u~uŋ ko~u *infəŋ sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i *infəŋ sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(paiwan, ro~u~ukai) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u paiwan , ro~u~ukai ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i taito~u~uŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i *infəŋ. b~vo~u~ukiɬ~ɮə , tjab~viɾjao~u~uɾ , sapo~u~uɾjo~u~ub~v , *aɬ~ɮo~u~u , po~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~un , tjo~u~uɬ~ɮjaas , kiniɾo~u~uko~u~uɾjan , ɬ~ɮjəɾo~u~unab~vo~u~unab~vo~u~uk , ɬ~ɮjo~u~umo~u~uɾj , tjo~u~uko~u~ub~vo~u~uɾj , tjo~u~uko~u~ub~vo~u~uɾj-b~viri , to~u~uɬ~ɮrib~vo~u~uan , ɾaɾiab~van , manani*aj , tjo~u~uɾitjo~u~uɾik , pao~u~uməɾi , b~viɾjao~u~uɾjao~u~uɾ , kaɾataɬ~ɮraŋ , kaaɾo~u~uan , maɾjib~vəɾ , b~vaɾjo~u~uɾo~u~u , maɬ~ɮaɾjaɾo~u~u , tjo~u~uɾətəb~vətəb~vək , maɾəɬ~ɮəp , tjo~u~uɾo~u~uo~u~uai , ŋo~u~uɬ~ɮra-ɬ~ɮrəkai(****ro~u~ukai**), ro~u~uɾakəs .
S.FORM: Jinfeng Itini i Taitung ko Jinfeng Siyang. sa'osi han ko po:long no palaan i, ira ko 387.53 km² (lalotolotokan a plalan no sa'osi i ira ko 271.51 km², o palaan noto'as i'a:yaw i ira ko 87.22 km²), 5,168 ko tamdaw i Jinfeng Siyang, 1,617 ko parod no loma', itini i niyaro' a Yincomin sa'osi han ira ko 5,002 a tamdaw, pakaala to 97%(Paiwan, Rukai) no polong no tamdaw. o Paiwan , Rukai ko sa'alomanay i Taitung. O kasaniyarona 5 ko cun, 27 ko niyaro' i Jinfeng. Vukide , Tjaviljaul , Sapuljuv , Gadu , Pudun , Tjudjaas , Kinilukuljan , Djelunavunavuk , Djumulj , Tjukuvulj , Tjukuvulj-viri , Tudrivuan , Laliavan , Mananigay , Tjulitjulik , Paumeli , Viljauljaul , Kalatadrang , Kaaluan , Maljivel , Valjulu , Madaljalu , Tjuletevetevek , Maledep , Tjuluuai , Ngudra-drekai(新富社區Rukai部落), Rulakes .
S.PHON: *infəŋ itini i taito~u~uŋ ko~u *infəŋ sijaŋ. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u po~u:ɾo~uŋ no~u paɾaan i, ira ko~u ***.** km* (ɾaɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~ukan a pɾaɾan no~u saʡo~usi i ira ko~u ***.** km*, o~u paɾaan no~uto~uʡas iʡa:jaw i ira ko~u **.** km*), *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw i *infəŋ sijaŋ, *,*** ko~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, itini i nijaro~uʡ a jinʦo~umin saʡo~usi ħan ira ko~u *,*** a tamɬ~ɮaw, pakaaɾa to~u **%(paiwan, ro~u~ukai) no~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u paiwan , ro~u~ukai ko~u saʡaɾo~umanaj i taito~u~uŋ. o~u kasanijaro~una * ko~u ʦo~u~un, ** ko~u nijaro~uʡ i *infəŋ. b~vo~u~ukiɬ~ɮə , tjab~viɾjao~u~uɾ , sapo~u~uɾjo~u~ub~v , *aɬ~ɮo~u~u , po~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~un , tjo~u~uɬ~ɮjaas , kiniɾo~u~uko~u~uɾjan , ɬ~ɮjəɾo~u~unab~vo~u~unab~vo~u~uk , ɬ~ɮjo~u~umo~u~uɾj , tjo~u~uko~u~ub~vo~u~uɾj , tjo~u~uko~u~ub~vo~u~uɾj-b~viri , to~u~uɬ~ɮrib~vo~u~uan , ɾaɾiab~van , manani*aj , tjo~u~uɾitjo~u~uɾik , pao~u~uməɾi , b~viɾjao~u~uɾjao~u~uɾ , kaɾataɬ~ɮraŋ , kaaɾo~u~uan , maɾjib~vəɾ , b~vaɾjo~u~uɾo~u~u , maɬ~ɮaɾjaɾo~u~u , tjo~u~uɾətəb~vətəb~vək , maɾəɬ~ɮəp , tjo~u~uɾo~u~uo~u~uai , ŋo~u~uɬ~ɮra-ɬ~ɮrəkai(****ro~u~ukai**), ro~u~uɾakəs .
